name: Vegetable Burger Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a large saucepan.
2. Drain off any excess fat.
3. Stir in water, stewed tomatoes, tomato sauce, frozen mixed vegetables, dry onion soup mix, and sugar.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
